notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Alex Freeland.

notableEvents.label: Shohei Ohtani plunked

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
